understanding.inferredBusinessObjective: Prove that accepted AG OS lessons and relevant active skills are retrieved into a later project plan without granting permission.
successCriteria: The accepted compounding lesson appears in the generated plan basis.
Relevant active skills appear in the generated plan basis.
Completion produces a quality score and lesson candidates with source-controlled evidence.
assumptions: This is a local plan-only proof with no external execution.
Accepted lessons and skills are advisory memory and grant no authority.
ownerConstraints: The Constitution remains the governing authority.
Do not deploy, merge, access credentials, or perform external actions.
Preserve all approval and safety gates.

rawCommand: Verify that accepted AG OS compounding lessons and relevant skills are reused in a later dashboard completion plan.
plannedOutput: Plan-only command intake record for dashboard.
